ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizing_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion entry */,
  "underbust_circumference" TEXT /* Underbust circumference in inches and centimeters */,
  "eur_size" INTEGER /* Size in European (EUR) standard */,
  "fr_size" INTEGER /* Size in French (FR) standard */,
  "de_size" INTEGER /* Size in German (DE) standard */,
  "it_size" INTEGER /* Size in Italian (IT) standard */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* Size in United Kingdom (UK) standard */,
  "usa_size" INTEGER /* Size in United States (USA) standard */,
  "aus_size" INTEGER /* Size in Australian (AUS) standard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used to make the product */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Fit type of the product (e.g., slim, regular, loose) */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the product (e.g., casual, formal, streetwear) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the brand originated */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Brand's official website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variant */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the variant */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the variant */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the variant in stock */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the variant */,
  "discounted_price" REAL /* Discounted price of the variant */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the variant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size */,
  "size_standard" TEXT /* Standard of the size (e.g., EUR, FR, DE, IT, UK, USA, AUS) */,
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size conversion entry */,
  "chest_circumference" TEXT /* Chest circumference in inches and centimeters */,
  "waist_circumference" TEXT /* Waist circumference in inches and centimeters */,
  "hip_circumference" TEXT /* Hip circumference in inches and centimeters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_conversion_id FOREIGN KEY ("conversion_id") REFERENCES sizing_conversions ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, administrator, manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_addresses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product variant */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the variant in the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES product_variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., sales, traffic) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)
